Document 46

Title Technical Delegate's Report

Manuel Leal

1 
 
 
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
  
  
From The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate   
  
To The Stewards      Date  06 June 2026 
  
 
 
TECHNICAL DELEGATE’S REPORT 
 
The following driver is using a new energy store (ES) for the remainder of the Competition: 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used ES 
    
23 Williams Mercedes Alexander Albon 1 
 
The energy store unit used by the above driver is one (1) of the three (3) new energy store units 
allowed for the 2026 Championship season and this is in conformity with Article B8.2.2  d) of the 
2026 Formula One Sporting Regulations. 
 
 
The following driver is using a new control electronic s unit  (PU-CE) for the remainder of the 
Competition: 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used PU-CE 
    
23 Williams Mercedes Alexander Albon 1 
 
The control electronics unit used by the above driver is one (1) of the three (3)  new
